intro.summary: Whether you're planning a new website, improving an existing one, or looking for a frontend developer to join your team, feel free to reach out through the contact form, email, or WhatsApp. I'd be happy to discuss your project and how I can help.
intro.availability: Available for frontend opportunities, freelance projects, and collaborations.

quickContactCards.title: Let's start a conversation
quickContactCards.text: The best way to discuss projects, opportunities, and frontend development work.

quickContactCards.title: Quick chat
quickContactCards.text: Ideal for quick questions, project discussions, and faster communication.

quickContactCards.title: Connect professionally
quickContactCards.text: Let's connect to discuss opportunities, collaborations, and professional networking.

quickContactCards.title: Based in Karachi, Pakistan
quickContactCards.text: Available for remote work and collaborations with teams and clients worldwide.

formIntro.title: Tell me about your project
formIntro.summary: Share your project goals, timeline, and requirements, and I'll get back to you with the next steps.

detailCards.title: Usually within 24 hours
detailCards.text: I aim to reply promptly with clear communication and practical next steps. WhatsApp is often the fastest way to reach me.

detailCards.title: Open to new opportunities
detailCards.text: Currently available for frontend roles, freelance projects, and long-term collaborations.

ctaStrip.text: If you'd rather skip the contact form, feel free to reach out by email or WhatsApp.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.ariaLabel: Chat with Taha Khan on WhatsApp
